text: India’s biggest brand destroyer isn’t foreign criticism, it’s urban misgovernance. When fires, collapses, garbage, traffic and unsafe living become normal, growth stats lose their shine. Cities build nations. Neglecting them weakens Brand India. Bangalore is a sorry example https://t.co/9qDhnMlYeu
author: @Chetankrishna

text: @DKShivakumar First save dying lakes in Bengaluru Bengaluru stuggling for water Raja kaluves are blocked & rain water flows on road during rain & sewage flows to lake making ground water poisonous stop selling big lakes to Builders for profit ...

text:
Now that I have settled-in a bit, had very early morning catchup with visiting good people today (thank you @ruchitgarg), followed by a quick breakfast at MTR, a short walk around Cubbon park and back home all within 2 hours.

A good precursor to Mysore next weekend and Goa the
author: @Icarus_Reloaded
